cancel_a_calendly_scheduled_event_with_a: Cancel a Calendly scheduled event with an optional reason. Use to call off a meeting and notify the invitee through Calendly.
describe_the_end_time_e_g_end_of: Describe the end time (e.g., "end of week", "end of month")...
describe_the_start_time_e_g_today_start: Describe the start time (e.g., "today", "start of month")...
enter_event_type_uuid_or_uri: Enter event type UUID or URI
enter_scheduled_event_uuid_or_uri: Enter scheduled event UUID or URI
enter_your_calendly_personal_access_toke: Enter your Calendly personal access token
integrate_calendly_into_your_workflow_ma: Integrate Calendly into your workflow. Manage event types, scheduled events, invitees, and webhooks. Can also trigger workflows based on Calendly webhook events (invitee scheduled, invitee canceled, routing form submitted). Requires Personal Access Token.
pull_upcoming_calendly_scheduled_events_: Pull upcoming Calendly scheduled events for a date range and summarize them. Use to brief a host on their schedule or build a daily agenda.
resource_data_user_event_type_event_etc: Resource data (user, event type, event, etc.)
retrieve_the_invitees_for_a_calendly_sch: Retrieve the invitees for a Calendly scheduled event, including answers and contact info. Use to prep for a meeting or sync attendees to a CRM.
uri_of_the_calendly_user_who_created_thi: URI of the Calendly user who created this webhook
when_enabled_shows_only_active_event_typ: When enabled, shows only active event types. When disabled, shows all event types.
